arts.ttl: Dortmund boss sets timeframe for Schlotterbeck's recovery: "A shock for us"
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund sporting director Sebastian Kehl has revealed that Nico Schlotterbeck is expected to be sidelined for half a year.
Where to watch, predicted line-ups, team news for the quarter-final first leg.

arts.ttl: Arsenal midfielder eyeing summer transfer to Barcelona
arts.sum: Arsenal midfielder Thomas Partey is set to leave when his contract expires and reportedly hopes to join Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Raphinha chasing Lionel Messi Barcelona record in Champions League clash with Borussia Dortmund
arts.sum: Barcelona wing wizard Raphinha will be chasing down a club Champions League record set by Lionel Messi in Wednesday's Champions League clash with Borussia Dortmund.

arts.ttl: Newcastle star linked with Real Madrid, Barcelona & Man City expresses desire to leave
arts.sum: Newcastle United midfielder Sandro Tonali is reported to have informed the club of his desire to leave, which could pave the way for summer investment in a replacement.

arts.ttl: ‘An excellent player’ – Barcelona boss Hansi Flick sends message of support to Dortmund star
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick has on Tuesday sent a message of well wishes the way of Borussia Dortmund star Nico Schlotterbeck. This of course comes ahead of the upcoming…

arts.ttl: Yamal on his rise: 'As if I'm playing PES'
arts.sum: Lamine Yamal has told ESPN it feels as if he's "playing Pro Evolution Soccer [sic]" as the teenager targets a treble with Barcelona this season.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star confirms his dream is to retire at the club
arts.sum: Barcelona star Gavi has this week revealed his hopes of bringing a close to his playing days in the colours of the Blaugrana. Midfielder Gavi, for his part, has spent…

arts.ttl: Barcelona star to return to fitness for Dortmund 2nd leg
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona are hopeful of Dani Olmo returning to fitness in time to play an ‘important’ role in the club’s Champions League return leg meeting with Borussia Dortmund.…

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund predicted lineup vs Barcelona - Champions League
arts.sum: Predicting Dortmund's starting lineup during their Champions League quarter-final first leg with Barcelona on Wednesday.
